description: Style NoteGlitzy mini-wedges with innovative design details. For a high-glamour evening, this is the right foot-style choice. Keep the accessories metallic and tonal, and the ensemble simple and elegant.Product DetailsShimmery thong style straps with cut-outs Soft footbed with a cushioned heel patchShort wedge heelTPU outsole with patterningMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
